items.title: Rendered active prompts resolve for health and generic org types
items.precondition: Repository checkout with the agent prompt changes applied.
steps: 1. Run npx vitest run src/__tests__/orgLabels.test.ts src/__tests__/agentPromptOrgType.test.ts.
2. Confirm every active in-scope prompt renders for health and generic without unresolved placeholders.
3. Confirm generic rendered prompts reject banned healthcare examples outside allowlisted schema-key context.
items.evidence: PASS: 2 test files, 14 tests. The only warning was the intentional unknown-placeholder orgLabels test.

items.title: Prompt callers use org-type substitution before LLM execution
items.precondition: Prompt caller files are present in src/controllers and src/utils.
steps: 1. Search prompt callers for loadPrompt and substitutePromptPlaceholders.
2. Confirm Proofline, PMS column mapping, PMS paste sanitizer, monthly agent, ranking, and GBP prompt paths substitute resolved org labels.
items.expected: Every in-scope prompt caller with organization context resolves org type server-side and calls substitutePromptPlaceholders before runAgent or AI completion.
items.evidence: PASS: rg found substitution in service.monthly-agent-runner-core.ts, service.daily-agent-processor.ts, columnMappingInference.ts, pms-paste-analysis.service.ts, service.webhook-orchestrator.ts, GbpDraftGenerationService.ts, and GbpLocalPostDraftService.ts.
items.notes: External N8N and public audit prompts are out of scope for this plan.

items.title: Parser contracts and legacy schema keys stay stable
items.precondition: Prompt markdown and parser caller changes are applied.
steps: 1. Inspect the PMS mapping and sanitizer prompt diffs.
2. Confirm role enum values and output schema names remain unchanged.
3. Run TypeScript to catch caller signature drift.
items.expected: Legacy values such as patient, referring_doctor, production_total, and doctor_referral_matrix remain as schema keys or role enums only.
items.evidence: PASS: npx tsc --noEmit exited 0. Prompt tests allow legacy schema keys while blocking generic freeform healthcare prose.

items.title: No live agent run or client task creation occurred during execution
items.precondition: Execution is limited to code, prompt, and test changes.
steps: 2. Confirm no monthly, daily, GBP, PMS ingestion, or task-generation endpoint was invoked.
items.expected: The execution creates no live client-facing agent rows or tasks.
items.evidence: PASS: Only static source reads, Vitest, TypeScript, convention checks, git diff checks, and an admin login-page navigation were run.

items.title: Verification gates pass
items.expected: Hard gates pass. check:all may report existing warning backlog only.
items.evidence: PASS: TypeScript exited 0, check:conventions --strict exited 0, git diff --check exited 0, and check:all exited 0 with existing advisory warnings.
items.notes: check:all still prints existing ESLint/dependency-cruiser warnings outside this plan.

items.title: Pilot-mode browser review of existing generic agent-output surfaces
items.precondition: Authenticated admin session in the available browser, then Pilot into a generic organization and a healthcare organization.
steps: 2. Use the admin organization view Pilot feature to enter a generic organization.
3. Inspect existing generated output surfaces for stale healthcare wording.
items.expected: Existing displayed generic surfaces remain covered by display-time translation, while new prompt output is guarded by the rendered-prompt tests.
items.evidence: PASS: authenticated Pilot into org 45 Alloro Team's Organization (generic) showed Business Hub, Revenue Hub, Customer Journey Insights, Upload revenue data, Leads, customers, and no client-frame healthcare labels. Pilot into org 39 One Endodontics (health) showed Practice Hub, Referrals Hub, Patient Journey Insights, Upload PMS data, patients, doctor referral source, and production.
items.notes: The only active generic org had 0 agent_results, 0 tasks, 0 pms_jobs, and 0 notifications, so this browser pass verified visible generic labels and empty states rather than historical generated output rows. A raw generic snapshot match for 'practice' came from the admin sidebar URL /admin/practice-ranking outside the embedded client frame.
